title: Create a lesson job from a topic, URL, or existing script
user_visible_behavior: so that lesson creation can begin from generated content or previously prepared content
verification_command: Studio offers both entry points, persists a valid lesson job under output/, and rejects malformed imports without writing partial project data.
evidence: Generation/import integration tests pass; invalid requests and secrets create no partial project.

title: Inspect render units and durable artifact status
user_visible_behavior: so that the creator knows which artifact is missing, ready, failed, or stale
verification_command: Every job exposes status for each render unit and final composition, and refresh preserves state derived from artifacts and source changes.
evidence: Durable state, legacy stale adoption, failed artifact errors, and restart recovery tests pass.

title: Edit and rerender only affected HyperFrames artifacts
user_visible_behavior: so that correcting one scene does not rerender unaffected scenes
verification_command: Voice-only and visual-only edits invalidate only their dependency set, and rendering one scene leaves unrelated artifacts untouched.
evidence: Targeted invalidation/render tests pass and unrelated scene file timestamp remains unchanged.

title: Open, configure, and render short clips in Studio
user_visible_behavior: so that algorithm videos no longer require a separate command-line-only workflow
verification_command: Studio lists a short-clip project, exposes supported fields, renders through the dedicated renderer, and displays its final MP4 as one render unit.
evidence: 12-element short clip creates one unit, renders ready, and records scoped failures.
